name: Dr. Sarah Johnson
bio: Dr. Sarah Johnson is an English language instructor with over 12 years of teaching experience in both academic and professional environments. She holds a PhD in Applied Linguistics and has worked with learners from beginner (A1) to advanced (C2) levels. Her areas of specialization include English grammar, academic writing, IELTS and TOEFL preparation, pronunciation training, speaking fluency development, and curriculum design. She has designed numerous English courses focused on the four core language skills: Reading, Writing, Listening, and Speaking. Dr. Johnson is particularly interested in helping students improve their communication skills through practical, real-world learning activities and personalized feedback.
